TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-frog_Waecacane

S.FORM: kay abulu kay yaie.
S.TRANSL: 這故事…
This story…

S.FORM: yakay kudra vavalake si vavalake ka sawvalay si taupungu ini la kidringai kudra vaeva ku takurauru.
S.TRANSL: 然後要找到一隻青蛙。
then finding a frog.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sa ka maungu nga yaie sa apece nga ki kuini taupungu si ki kuini vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 晚上的時候，當小狗和小孩睡著時
At night, when the dog and the kid slept

S.FORM: ki kuini takurauru la kainganay twalay ki kingidralumu kibubuli ngiabalay si katuase ubere.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙從瓶子偷偷跑出來，然後慢慢地逃離。
The frog came from the bottle stealthily, and slowly ran away.

S.FORM: sa alrigilrigi ki kuini sawavalay si kuini taupungu ini la dreele kadrua nga kudra takurauru kudra yadringi kuini kingidralumu.
S.TRANSL: 當男孩和他的狗醒來，(他們)看到青蛙不在瓶子裡。
When the boy and his dog woke up, (they) saw the frog is not inside the bottle.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la kai makakidrignai.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他們)找不到
Then (they) cannot find (it).

S.FORM: la mulebe ki lribange si dawdawdaw dawdawlu ki kuini ki takurauru la kakadrua.
S.TRANSL: 然後男孩去樓梯處叫喊著，想叫青蛙回來，但青蛙卻不見了。
Then (the boy) went down to the window and yelled at the frog (but) there is no frog.

S.FORM: sa ilribange dawdawdaw ki kuini tadrusa yaie la kai dredreele la katuase tuverevere mucakena ki kuini taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 當他們兩個在窗戶前喊叫時，他們沒看到任何東西。然後狗就掉到地上。
When the two were yelling at the window, (they) didn’t see anything. Then the dog fell down to the ground.

S.FORM: la kadruthili ki kuini kingidralumu kuini wamua kuini wakabungu ku aulru ini si la kiangeange turamuru.
S.TRANSL: 然後罩住狗狗的頭的瓶子就碎掉了，然後(狗狗)很痛。
Then the bottle that covered the (dog’s) head was broken into pieces and (the dog) hurt very much.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ki kuini tadrusa yaie la kai makakindringai ikay latadre katuase muubuluane takudawdawdaw ku takurauru takurauru la iyaiya la kakadrua.
S.TRANSL: 這兩個人啊，在外面找不到青蛙，就往草叢去，邊喊邊叫著青蛙但都找不到。
The two cannot find (the frog) outside, (and they) went to the bush yelling and talking to the frog simultaneously (but the frog) was not here.

S.FORM: la arukatuase arukatuase kela ubuluane.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他們)越走越靠近草叢
Then (they) came closer and closer to the bush.

S.FORM: la ngukakay nga kudra ki lalulutu kudra ki la e madu kudra ki la amakakidringaiane lini.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們沿著可能找得到(青蛙的)坑走。
Then (they) went along the holes where they can find (the frog).

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ki kuini taupungu la mua thethengete kuini ki sigu.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗去騷擾虎頭蜂窩。
That dog went to harass the hornet (beehive).

S.FORM: velevelevele kuini ki angatu.
S.TRANSL: (那隻狗) 去搖那棵樹。
(That dog) was shaking the tree.

S.FORM: ala kaynganay tuverevere kuini ki sigu mulebe si kaynganay ki kuini tumu ngipalapalapalay ikay kurikurisi iniane.
S.TRANSL: 然後虎頭蜂掉下來，跑出來，然後他們飛出來去追那隻狗。
Then the hornets fell down and came out. (They) came out and flew to chase it (the dog).

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.自由斜格

S.FORM: ki kuini vavalake kuini sawvalay la katuase ubelenge wadreele kudra barungulu kuini ki madradradraw kuini angatu si lawyakay adringi la iya.
S.TRANSL: 那個男孩爬上樹去看大樹洞，猜想(他)是不是在裡面。
The boy went up to see the big tree hole and thought (the frog) may be inside.

S.FORM: naw mua lili la iya.
S.TRANSL: 「我去偷看」他這樣想。
“I went to peep,” he thought.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: kaynganay ku kuici si puadukuduku ki e aulru ini katuase muadreke muadreke mulebe ki angatu.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹出來啄他的頭。(男孩) 跌落樹下。
The owl came out and pecked his head. (The boy) fell down the tree.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ki kuini wathethethengete kuini ki sigu kuini taupungu la kikurikurisi kuini ki sigu si la katuase nga ubere.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗騷擾那些虎頭蜂，就被虎頭蜂追，然後(那隻狗)就逃走了。
The dog harassed the hornets and was chased by the hornets and then (the dog) ran away.

S.FORM: sa ubebere ki kuini tadrusa yaie katuatuase sa kelakela kuini ki pingapingade si.
S.TRANSL: 當他們兩個逃離，他們來到懸崖邊邊
When the two ran away, they came to the edge of the cliff.

S.FORM: ala dreele kuini ricingi kuini sawavalay katuase ubelenge kuini ki e lawricingi la iya ki kuini miakaw miakaw ricingi ki angatu la katuase sa ka kuini belenge si dawdawdaw silasilape kuini takurauru.
S.TRANSL: 然後(男孩)看到樹枝。他爬上很像樹枝的東西然後邊喊邊尋找著青蛙。
Then (the boy) saw the branch. The boy went up to something that seems to be a branch, yelled and searched for the frog.

S.FORM: la kai thingathingale alaka lawngu ki salawnguane.
S.TRANSL: (他)不知道原來是鹿的角。
(he) didn’t know it turned out to be the horn of the deer.

S.FORM: kuini salawnguane la katuase laylaylay ubebere kudra nawsarare amiamia ki kuini sawvalay si la kai makatumane.
S.TRANSL: 那隻鹿逃走想把男孩放下來，但卻放不下來。
That deer ran away and would like put down the boy but cannot do so.

S.FORM: la katuase laylay kela kuini ki tuatukadrane sa kela tuatukadrane yaie.
S.TRANSL: 然後(鹿)跑到懸崖。
Then (the deer) ran to the cliff.

S.FORM: sa pasana nguadreadreke yaie kusida kuini ki drapale ini kuini salawnguane si la katuase tuverevere mulebe ki kuini vavalake kuini sawvalay si kuini taupungu ini.
S.TRANSL: 當幾乎要跌到的時候，鹿煞住他的腳，然後男孩和他的狗就掉了下去。
When (it) almost fell over, the deer braked his feet and the boy and his dog fell down.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格
第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sa katuase tuverevere yaie la makakay kudra ki aciacilay kuini ki vaalruvaalru.
S.TRANSL: 當(他們)掉下去，就馬上掉入溪流裡。
When (they) fell down, (they fell) right down to the stream.

S.FORM: la katuase ngiabalay ki kuini tadrusa.
S.TRANSL: 然後那兩個慢慢地離開。
Then the two left slowly.

S.FORM: la dreele kudra angatu kudra cucuangalre.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他們)看到樹的枯木。
Then (they) saw the dead wood of the tree.

S.FORM: la kilalra miakaw yakay ku malalrialriaw la katuase ngiabalay kuini tadrusa.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他們)似乎聽到七嘴八舌的聲音，然後他們兩個就慢慢地過去。
Then (they) seemed to hear (someone) was talking loudly and the two left for it slowly.

S.FORM: manemane ini kuini malalriwlriaw ani miakaw amani kudra takuraru ta la iya.
S.TRANSL: 那個在發出聲音的是什麼？（男孩）說：「怎麼好像是我們的青蛙？」
What are those that talk loudly? (The boy) said, “it seems to be our frog.”

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格
第一人稱複數(包含).附著主格

S.FORM: la katuase ngibuale kuini ki angatu.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他們)探頭去看。
Then (they) came out to see the tree.

S.FORM: la dreele ala kidringai la kay katadruadrusa kuini sa dreele kuini ki kawrivariva malariariaw kuini ki takurauru.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他們)看見七嘴八舌的青蛙。
Then (they) saw and found the frogs that were talking loudly.

S.FORM: la kiragay turamuru kuini e tadrusa kuini vavalake si kuini taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 他們兩個(小孩和狗)非常開心。
The two, that kid and that dog, were very happy.

S.FORM: ala sa ka pilriane nga yaie ala alra ililuku ki kuini papalra lini kuini ki takurauru si katuase ubalriw.
S.TRANSL: 到最後，(他們)把其中一隻青蛙的同伴拿走帶回家。
At the end, (they) took one of the frog’s companion and bring it home.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: si e kila ki kuini la takuraru yaie la adririvane sa katuatuase ki kuini e e tatulru.
S.TRANSL: 然後當他們三個離開的時候，青蛙們都很依依不捨。
Then the frogs parted with reluctance when those three left.
